(b) According to the question,
Required answer = (15 × 9) + (12 × 4) × (4 + 4)
= (15 – 9) + (12 – 4) – (4 + 4)
= 6 + 8 – 8 = 6
(using VBODMAS rule)

(b) According to the question,
? = 15 B 3 C 24 A 12 D 2
= 15 + 3 + 24 – 12 × 2
= 5 + 24 – 12 × 2 = 5 + 24 – 24 = 5
(using VBODMAS rule)

(c) Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a),
40 – 10 + 10 × 5 = 92
⇒ 40 × 10 – 10 + 5 = 92 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 40 × 10 – 2 = 92
⇒ 400 – 2 = 92 ⇒ 398 = 92
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
Hence, option (a) is incorrect.
From option (b),
265 + 11 – 2 × 14 = 22
⇒ 265 – 11 × 2 + 14 = 22
⇒ 265 – 11 × 2/14 = 22 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 265 – 11/14 = 22 ⇒ 1855 – 11/7 = 22
⇒ 1844/7 = 22 ⇒ LHS ≠ RHS
Hence, option (b) is incorrect.
From option (c),
66 × 3 – 11 + 12 = 230
⇒ 66 + 3 × 11 – 12 = 230
⇒ 22 × 11 – 12 = 230 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 242 – 12 = 230
⇒ 230 = 230
∴ LHS = RHS
Hence, option (c) is correct.
As, we have got option (c) as our answer, there is no need to check option (d).

(b) Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a),
56 + 12 × 34 – 12 = 102
⇒ 56 – 12 + 34 × 12 = 102
⇒ 56 – 12/34 × 12 = 102 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 56 – 72/17 = 102 ⇒ 952 – 72/17 = 102
⇒ 880/17 = 102
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
Hence, option (a) is incorrect.
From option (b),
8 + 44 – 5 + 25 = 203
⇒ 8 + 44 × 5 – 25 = 203 ⇒ 8 + 220 – 25 = 203
⇒ 228 – 25 = 203 ⇒ 203 = 203
∴ LHS = RHS
So, option (b) is correct and there is no need to check remaining options.

(b) According to the question,
? = 5C 5D 5A 5B 5
= 5 × 5 + 5 + 5 – 5 (using VBODMAS rule)
= 5 × 1 + 5 – 5 = 10 – 5 = 5

(c) Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a),
8 A 8 B 8 C 8 = – 48
⇒ 8 + 8 – 8 × 8 = – 48
⇒ 8 + 8 – 64 = – 48 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 16 – 64 = – 48 ⇒ – 48 = – 48
∴ LHS = RHS
So, option (a) is correct and there is no need to check remaining options.

(c) From option (c),
9 > 5 > 4 – 18 + 9 > 16
By interchanging the signs,
9 + 5 + 4 = 18 + 9 + 16 ⇒ 18 = 18
Thus, option (c) is correct.

(c) Given expression, (50 × 2) W (28 T 4)
After interchanging the letters with symbols, we get
(50 + 2) + (28 × 4) = 25 + 112 = 137

(c) Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a),
25 × 12 – 14 + 4 ÷ 6 = 16
⇒ 25 – 12 + 14 × 4 ÷ 6 = 16 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 25 – 12 + 14 × 4/6 = 16
⇒ 25 – 12 + 28/3 = 16 ⇒ 75 – 36 + 28/3 = 16
